title: pfeifferago
intro: Pfeifferago, commonly known as Pfeifferago divaricata, is a type of flowering plant native to New Caledonia. The health benefits of Pfeifferago include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Therapeutically, Pfeifferago is used to treat various conditions, including fever and gastrointestinal problems. Bioactive constituents of Pfeifferago include flavonoids and diterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
